slides.01: You spent crores making your film. On release day, someone records it in the theatre — and within 24 hours, your investment is leaking across the internet. You worked for months. It takes one phone to undo all of it.
slides.02: Indian producers lose 60 to 80 percent of their revenue to piracy — and there is nothing they can do about it. No evidence. No control. Just loss.
slides.03: We built a system that detects piracy, proves it, and removes it — automatically, without you doing anything. Your film is protected before you even know there is a problem.
slides.04: Four layers of protection — IR Detection blocks recording in the theatre, TPVM destroys any footage captured, Watermarking identifies exactly who leaked it, and the Takedown System removes it from the internet automatically. Nothing gets through.
slides.05: Invisible infrared LEDs around the screen make every phone camera useless — the audience sees nothing different, but any recording turns into a completely white, unusable blur. No phone on earth can beat it.
slides.06: Seven invisible layers are injected into every frame during projection — the audience sees a perfect film, but any phone camera captures a flickering, scrambled, completely unwatchable mess. No recording device on the planet can beat this.
slides.07: Every frame carries a unique invisible watermark — the moment a pirated copy is found online, it reveals the exact theatre, screen, and show time. Court-admissible evidence. The person responsible cannot escape.
slides.08: YouTube — 10 minutes. Instagram — within 1 hour. Telegram, torrents, illegal sites — all gone within 72 hours. Every copy, every platform, handled automatically. Your film will never stay pirated for long.
slides.09: One-time setup — four documents, submitted once. After that, every takedown across YouTube, Telegram, Instagram, and Facebook happens automatically, instantly, forever. You do this once. We protect you always.
slides.10: A real-time dashboard shows every piracy link detected, removed, and pending — by platform. Instant alert the moment something is found. You do nothing — but you always know your film is safe.
slides.11: Before — 80 percent of revenue lost, no control, no evidence, no hope. After — revenue protected from day one, automatic 24/7 piracy removal, court-ready evidence always available. Your film releases and stays yours. That is our promise.
